GlobalValueSet.description: Outcome status for a WatcherDigest__c run. Success = every enabled signal returned cleanly AND Slack delivery succeeded (or no Slack post was attempted). Partial = at least one signal threw but the orchestrator caught and continued. Failed = the orchestrator itself errored before any signal ran. Slack_Failed = signals ran cleanly but the Slack webhook returned non-2xx or threw — subscribers may not have received the digest (see SlackResponseTxt__c for the response).
